generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring current vehicle speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering wheel angle for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance MotorFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring motor actuation state for feedback control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorFeedbackSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringFE
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationFE
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering wheel angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationFE
]

instance MotorFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor actuation feedback data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationFE
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for collecting sensor data from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for processing raw point clouds into structured object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for serializing data with ISO 23247 unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, along with data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands to external resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enable/disable of ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed and state data"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected object tracks from point cloud processing"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path for ACC"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves vehicle data to storage for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates reports based on collected vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of appropriate speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates actuation commands for throttle and braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity hosting sensor and actuator data processing"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorFeedbackSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity managing data and control mechanisms"
    base:contains DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, ISO23247DataTranslationFE
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User entity split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel ROS2 packages"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationPackage, ControlPanelPackage
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationPackage : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for 3D visualization of vehicle data and environment"
]

instance ControlPanelPackage : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for user control interface and command input"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE, including motor and steering actuation signals, are serialized and translated via the ISO 23247 Data Translation FE. Commands are transmitted through ROS2 for internal software components and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication to physical actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization between physical and digital components is maintained at 100 ms accuracy due to hardware constraints, despite industry standards for safety-critical vehicular applications typically mandating stricter synchronization (e.g., <100 ms). This temporal granularity supports computation offloading and ensures coordinated device operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA), organizing components into Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities. Each Functional Entity (FE) is implemented as a ROS2 package with associated nodes. Notably, the Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) rather than being limited to resource-specific operations as in the standard's OME. This structure ensures entity-specific deployment on distinct hardware while maintaining component integration via ROS2."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is achieved using OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control functions."
]
